'''Cloak Leader''' was a [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] [[TIE pilot|pilot]] in [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] fleet circa [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]].

This man led the [[Cloak Force|force]] of TIEs and [[Plasma-Jet Mole Miner|mole miners]] which were hidden in the [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaked]] cargo hold of the ''[[Nartissteu]]'' at the start of the [[Battle of Sluis Van]]. When the [[A-class bulk freighter]] exploded, Cloak Leader reported to [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Pellaeon]] that the command section of the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] had escaped and then engaged in protecting the mole miners as they attached themselves to "[[New Republic/Legends|rebel]]" vessels, until he was ordered by Thrawn to retreat back to the [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']].
